title: Event Schedule Optimizer
scenario: Develop a scheduling plan for a conference with 5 concurrent tracks. The plan should include session titles, speakers, and start/end times. The conference runs from 9am to 5pm with a 1-hour lunch break. There are 15 sessions in total, each lasting 1 hour. The plan should be presented in a Markdown table format.
constraints: Each session title and speaker should be on a new line

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated schedule adheres to the conference duration and track constraints.
The Markdown table format is correct and easy to read.
All session titles, speakers, and times are correct.
